commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR shares model-fallback harness-runtime resolution with auth cooldown filtering so CLI-owned candidates bypass persisted auth-profile cooldowns, and adds focused agent tests plus two agent test expectation updates.

PR surface: Source +34, Tests +60. Total +94 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main still applies the auth cooldown gate whenever an auth store exists, and the PR body gives a concrete terminal script for a canonical anthropic candidate resolved to claude-cli with anthropic:default in cooldown; I did not run it because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow repair can preserve runtime normalization/default handling and refresh the stale test path; maintainers still own final auth-provider acceptance.

target.title: fix(agents): skip auth cooldown gate for CLI providers
target.author: zhangguiping-xydt

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
